title: ITALY enforcement action against Esselunga S.p.A. (5,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,000 on Esselunga S.p.A. A former employee of the controller requested access to their attendance records. Rather than providing these records, the controller called the data subject to verify the reason for the request.
